title: bequaertiodendron oblanceolatum
intro: Bequaertiodendron oblanceolatum, also known as the Philippine mahogany, is a plant species in the family Meliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine in the Philippines to treat various ailments, particularly due to its medicinal properties in treating fever and pain. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that provide health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help protect against diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
